name: Thumbtack Home Services Marketplace API
what_it_does: Thumbtack home services and local professional marketplace REST API for connecting customers with local service professionals for home projects, events, and personal services. Enables AI agents to manage service professional search and profile retrieval for home service pro discovery automation, handle project request creation and contractor matching for home services intake automation, access cost estimate and quote generation for home project budgeting automation, retrieve professional review and rating data for service quality research automation, manage booking and appointment scheduling for home service appointment automation, handle service category taxonomy and skill matching for multi-trade home services automation, access pro availability calendar for service scheduling automation, retrieve market rate data and pricing benchmarks for competitive pricing automation, manage customer project history for home services relationship automation, and integrate Thumbtack with home management platforms, real estate apps, and home warranty systems for embedded local services.
use_cases: Finding home service pros from local services discovery agents
Estimating project costs from home improvement budgeting agents
Booking professionals from home services automation agents
Comparing service pros from quality research agents
best_when: A home technology company, real estate platform, or home warranty service wanting AI agents to automate local service professional discovery, project cost estimation, and appointment booking through Thumbtack's home services marketplace.
avoid_when: PRO AVAILABILITY AND BOOKING CONFIRMATION LATENCY: Thumbtack pro availability is not real-time guaranteed; automated booking confirmation before pro acceptance creates double-booking risk; Thumbtack uses request-quote-accept model for most categories; automated booking flow must handle pro decline and rematch scenario. TRADE LICENSE VERIFICATION FOR REGULATED SERVICES: Thumbtack provides background checks but state trade license currency varies; automated booking of licensed trade services must include state license verification; automated booking without license verification for electrical, plumbing, and HVAC work creates homeowner permit and liability risk. TCPA CONSENT FOR LEAD SHARING TO MULTIPLE PROS: Thumbtack's request model may share customer contact with multiple pros simultaneously; automated lead generation creating simultaneous multi-pro outreach without TCPA consent creates class action exposure; verify consent scope covers multiple simultaneous pro outreach.

auth.notes: Thumbtack uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2008 by Marco Zappacosta, Jonathan Swanson, and Jeremy Tunnell. Private ($750M+ raised, Google Capital, Tiger Global, Sequoia). 10M+ projects completed. 300,000+ pros in 1,000+ service categories. Request-quote-accept booking model. Pro subscription and lead-based pricing model. 2023 transition to subscription pricing for pros. Competes with Angi, TaskRabbit, and local directories for home services marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — partnership API access via enterprise program
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro: monthly subscription + per-lead fee; Customer: free; API partner: revenue share or per-booking integration fee
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Private ($750M+ raised). Founded 2008. 300,000+ pros. API access via enterprise partnership. Revenue share for embedded integration partners.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; search and project queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for project status

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — PROJECT STATUS REQUIRES POLLING: Thumbtack does not support webhooks; automated project request status (pro accepted, pro declined, in progress) requires scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with customer project urgency and pro response time expectations

REQUEST-QUOTE-ACCEPT MULTI-STEP BOOKING MODEL: Thumbtack booking uses request-quote-accept model for most categories (customer submits request, pros send quotes, customer selects); automated booking cannot guarantee immediate appointment confirmation; build multi-step booking flow with quote comparison and acceptance for most service categories

SUBSCRIPTION MODEL PRICING CHANGE FOR PROS: Thumbtack transitioned to pro subscription model in 2023; automated pro discovery and cost estimation must account for pro subscription-based pricing changes; cached pro pricing or availability data may not reflect current Thumbtack pro subscription tier and lead cost

MULTI-PRO SIMULTANEOUS CONTACT TCPA RISK: Thumbtack request model may contact multiple pros with customer information simultaneously; automated customer project creation must implement TCPA-compliant consent for multi-pro simultaneous contact; single consumer opt-in for pro contact may not cover simultaneous multi-pro outreach

SERVICE CATEGORY TAXONOMY VERSION CHANGES: Thumbtack periodically updates service category taxonomy and skill classifications; automated service matching built on specific category IDs must handle category ID changes; implement category taxonomy version check before building automated category-dependent matching workflows

PRO RESPONSE RATE VARIATION FOR SLA: Thumbtack pro response times vary by category, market, and seasonality; automated booking SLA commitments to customers based on Thumbtack pro response time data may not reflect current pro availability; implement fallback for slow pro response in high-urgency booking scenarios
agent_readiness.security_notes: Home services marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer PII, project data, and contractor information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Home services. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer PII, project, and service pro data.
